task_completion.description: Log in to OpenMRS and navigate to the ID Generation module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMRS web interface is visible, specifically showing the 'Manage Identifier Generators' page or the ID Generation module dashboard.

task_completion.description: Configure the generator name and identifier type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An identifier generator configuration form is visible with 'Nutrition ID Sequence' entered in the Name field and 'Nutrition ID' selected in the Identifier Type dropdown.
The configuration form shows '0123456789' entered in the 'Base Character Set' field.
The configuration form shows 'NUT' entered in the 'Prefix' field.

task_completion.description: Configure the minimum and maximum length constraints.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The configuration form shows '6' entered in both the 'Minimum Length' and 'Maximum Length' fields.

task_completion.description: Save the new sequential identifier generator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the generator was saved, or a list of identifier generators showing 'Nutrition ID Sequence' as an active/configured generator.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenMRS web GUI to configure the generator.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the OpenMRS application interface, not a terminal window executing SQL scripts or cURL commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are typed into the standard OpenMRS HTML form fields with correct styling, rather than being typed into a text editor or a mocked-up page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspector/Console) are not open and being used to modify the DOM to falsely display the generator in the list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating an OpenMRS Sequential Identifier Generator with the following exact values: Name must be 'Nutrition ID Sequence', Identifier Type must be 'Nutrition ID', Prefix must be 'NUT', Base Character Set must be exactly '0123456789' (digits 0-9 only), Minimum Length must be 6, and Maximum Length must be 6.
